d7f376b37bc4.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
d7f376b37bc4.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
d7f376b37bc4.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

13db7cdfb6e6.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
13db7cdfb6e6.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
13db7cdfb6e6.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

119f35a65644.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
119f35a65644.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
119f35a65644.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

56f0ea6ca290.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
56f0ea6ca290.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

26d06eb56ecf.title: Ranked #5 of 5 locally — peers are ahead
26d06eb56ecf.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

4cd210f9ef82.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
4cd210f9ef82.description: You trail peers by 2.6 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
